## Problem

What workflow is blocked or awkward today?

## Proposed Change

Describe the behavior you want.

## Why This Fits snapview

Explain how this aligns with snapview's preview-driven workflow.

## Alternatives Considered

What workarounds or different approaches did you consider?

## Additional Context

Examples, screenshots, or related issues.
